plugins.name: cardboard-skills
plugins.description: Reusable, project- and language-agnostic Claude Code skills: sharpen (prove-equivalent perf optimization), write-a-tutorial (step-by-step walkthroughs), harden-claude (lean post-session docs hardening).

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's (aihero.dev) Claude Code skills — TDD, diagnose, triage, to-issues, to-prd, handoff, zoom-out, and more. MIT-licensed; referenced from github.com/mattpocock/skills, not vendored, so it tracks his upstream.
